info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Cloud Control REST API
Targets
Oracle Enterprise Manager List Targets

params.name: targetName
params.description: Filter targets by name. Supports partial matching.

params.name: targetType
params.description: Filter targets by type (e.g., oracle_database, host, weblogic_j2eeserver).

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip for pagination.

items.docs: Returns a list of monitored targets in Enterprise Manager. Supports filtering by target name, target type, and lifecycle status. Results are paginated.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Create a Target

items.docs: Creates a new monitored target in Enterprise Manager. Requires target name, target type, and host information. Additional properties can be specified depending on the target type.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Target Details

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific target including its configuration properties, monitoring status, and associated metadata.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Update a Target

items.docs: Updates properties of an existing target. Only the specified fields are modified; unspecified fields remain unchanged.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Delete a Target

items.docs: Removes a monitored target from Enterprise Manager. This stops all monitoring, removes collected data associations, and deletes the target configuration.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Target Properties

items.docs: Returns the configuration and monitoring properties of a specific target, including instance properties, dynamic properties, and any custom properties defined for the target type.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Bulk Update Target Properties

items.docs: Updates multiple properties of a target in a single request. Useful for batch configuration changes.

info.name: Metrics
Oracle Enterprise Manager List Metric Groups for a Target

items.docs: Returns a list of all metric groups available for a specific target. Metric groups organize related metrics and define the collection schedule and columns.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Metric Group Details

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific metric group for a target, including metric column definitions, collection frequency, and thresholds.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Latest Metric Data

items.docs: Returns the most recently collected metric data for a specific metric group on a target. Provides the latest snapshot of performance values.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Metric Time Series Data

params.name: targetNames
params.description: Comma-separated list of target names to retrieve metric data for.

params.name: targetTypes
params.description: Comma-separated list of target types to filter by.

params.name: metricGroups
params.description: Comma-separated list of metric group names.

params.name: metricColumns
params.description: Comma-separated list of metric column names.

params.name: startTime
params.description: Start of the time range in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: endTime
params.description: End of the time range in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

items.docs: Returns numeric metric data points over a specified time range for one or more targets. Supports filtering by target, metric group, metric column, and time range.

info.name: Incidents
Oracle Enterprise Manager List Incidents

params.name: sinceTime
params.description: Return incidents created after this time in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip for pagination.

items.docs: Returns a list of incidents in Enterprise Manager. Supports filtering by severity, priority, status, target, and time range. Incidents represent actionable issues detected by monitoring rules.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Incident Details

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific incident including severity, priority, status, associated target, timeline, and resolution information.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Clear an Incident

items.docs: Clears an incident, indicating that the issue has been resolved. The incident status is set to CLOSED.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Suppress an Incident

items.docs: Suppresses an incident so it does not appear in active incident views or trigger notifications. Useful for known issues under investigation.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Unsuppress an Incident

items.docs: Reverses the suppression of an incident, restoring it to active visibility and notification eligibility.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Incident Events

items.docs: Returns the list of events associated with an incident. Events are the underlying monitoring detections that were correlated to form the incident.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Incident Annotations

items.docs: Returns annotations (comments and notes) associated with an incident. Annotations provide a record of investigation and remediation steps.

info.name: Events
Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Event Details

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific event, including its type, severity, message, target association, and timestamps.

info.name: Blackouts
Oracle Enterprise Manager List Blackouts

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of items to skip for pagination.

items.docs: Returns a list of blackouts (maintenance windows) configured in Enterprise Manager. Supports filtering by status and associated target.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Create a Blackout

items.docs: Creates a new blackout (maintenance window) for one or more targets. During a blackout, monitoring data is still collected but alerts and notifications are suppressed.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Blackout Details

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific blackout including its schedule, affected targets, status, and reason.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Edit a Blackout

items.docs: Modifies an existing blackout. Can update the schedule, targets, reason, or other properties. Only scheduled or started blackouts can be edited.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Delete a Blackout

items.docs: Deletes a blackout. Only scheduled (not yet started) blackouts can be deleted. Use the stop action to end an active blackout.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Stop a Blackout

items.docs: Stops an active blackout before its scheduled end time. Monitoring and alerting resume immediately for all affected targets.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Blackout Targets

items.docs: Returns the list of targets affected by a specific blackout, including both directly specified targets and targets included via group membership.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Blackout Statistics

items.docs: Returns summary statistics about blackouts including counts by status, upcoming blackouts, and recently ended blackouts.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager List Blackout Reasons

items.docs: Returns a list of predefined blackout reasons that can be associated with blackouts for categorization and reporting.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Create a Blackout Reason

items.docs: Creates a new blackout reason that can be used when creating or editing blackouts.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Delete a Blackout Reason

params.name: reasonId
params.description: Unique identifier of the blackout reason.

items.docs: Deletes a blackout reason by its identifier.

info.name: Global Target Properties
Oracle Enterprise Manager List Global Target Properties

items.docs: Returns a list of global target properties that are defined for classifying and organizing targets.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Create a Global Target Property

items.docs: Creates a new global target property definition. Global properties provide a way to classify targets with custom metadata.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Global Target Property Details

params.name: globalTargetPropertyId
params.description: Unique identifier of the global target property.

items.docs: Returns details of a specific global target property.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Modify a Global Target Property

params.name: globalTargetPropertyId
params.description: Unique identifier of the global target property.

items.docs: Updates a global target property definition.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Delete a Global Target Property

params.name: globalTargetPropertyId
params.description: Unique identifier of the global target property.

items.docs: Deletes a global target property definition.

info.name: Oracle Enterprise Manager Get Valid Values for a Global Target Property

params.name: globalTargetPropertyId
params.description: Unique identifier of the global target property.

items.docs: Returns the list of valid values defined for a global target property, if the property has a constrained value set.
